title: ffi/client: missing PoW token support in auth (connect_with_retry path)
description: ffi/src/api/client.rs client_connect() calls transport::connect_with_retry(), which calls open_authenticated_ws(). That function does mine a PoW token (core/src/transport.rs). However spawn_blocking is used inside an async context that is driven by the Tokio runtime embedded in the flutter_rust_bridge executor. If the flutter_rust_bridge executor does not support spawn_blocking (e.g. uses a single-threaded runtime), mining will deadlock. This is a latent issue that depends on the FRB executor configuration. Needs explicit verification or a comment.
